png

Class PngChunkSRGB

  • java.lang.Object
    • png.PngChunk
      • png.PngChunkSRGB

  • public class PngChunkSRGB
extends PngChunk
    Represents an sRGB (Standard RGB Colour Space) chunk in a PNG file.

    This chunk contains a single byte that specifies the rendering intent associated with the image's sRGB colour space.

    Since:
    06 July 2026
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Constructor Detail

      • PngChunkSRGB

        public PngChunkSRGB(long length,
                    byte[] typeBytes,
                    int crc32,
                    byte[] data,
                    long offsetStart)
        Constructs a PngChunkSRGB instance with the specified metadata.
        Parameters:
        length - the length of the chunk's data field (must be exactly 1)
        typeBytes - the raw 4-byte chunk type
        crc32 - the CRC value read from the file
        data - raw chunk data
        offsetStart - the absolute physical position in the file where the chunk begins

    • Method Detail

      • getRendering

        public int getRendering()
        Returns the raw rendering intent value stored in the chunk.
        Returns:
        the rendering intent value

      • translateRendering

        public java.lang.String translateRendering()
        Returns a human-readable description of the rendering intent.
        Returns:
        the rendering intent description

      • printProperties

        public void printProperties(PropertyDisplay display)
        Prints the structural image header fields of this chunk to the specified display target.

        Integration Note: This method is intended primarily for use by PhotoshopManager, which invokes it to collect and format chunk properties for display and reporting.

        Overrides:
        printProperties in class PngChunk
        Parameters:
        display - the target that receives the formatted metadata properties

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and structural metadata.
        Overrides:
        toString in class PngChunk
        Returns:
        a formatted string describing this chunk
